channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Breezy Johnson's downhill gold is America's first medal of 2026 Winter Olympics
item.description: Breezy Johnson's first Olympic medal is a gold, won in a race marred by the crash of teammate Lindsey Vonn

item.title: Washington Post C.E.O. Will Lewis Steps Down After Stormy Tenure
item.description: His departure came days after the company cut 30 percent of the staff. He will be replaced in the interim by Jeff D’Onofrio, the chief financial offic...

item.title: US ski star Lindsey Vonn crashes in Olympic downhill race
item.description: In an explosive crash near the top of the downhill course in Cortina, Vonn landed a jump perpendicular to the slope and tumbled to a stop shortly belo...

item.title: U.K. leader's chief of staff quits over hiring of Epstein friend as U.S. ambassador
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer's chief of staff resigned Sunday over the furor surrounding the appointment of Peter Mandelson as U.K. ambassador ...

item.title: Starmer’s Chief of Staff Resigns, Citing Role in Mandelson Appointment
item.description: The chief of staff, Morgan McSweeney, was caught up in the scandal engulfing Britain’s former ambassador to the United States and his ties to Jeffrey ...

item.title: Thailand counts votes in early election with 3 main parties vying for power
item.description: Vote counting was underway in Thailand's early general election on Sunday, seen as a three-way race among competing visions of progressive, populist a...

item.title: Trump administration lauds plastic surgeons' statement on trans surgery for minors
item.description: A patient who came to regret the top surgery she got as a teen won a $2 million malpractice suit. Then, the American Society of Plastic Surgeons clari...

item.title: Breezy Johnson’s celebration is muted by Lindsey Vonn’s crash.
item.description: Johnson won her first Olympic gold medal after her teammate Vonn crashed early in her run.

item.title: The Secret History of the Deep State
item.description: Seven pages of grand jury testimony from Richard Nixon were deemed so incendiary that they were hidden from the public for years.

item.title: Live Updates: Japan’s Leader Set for Big Win in Snap Election
item.description: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi was on course for a sweeping mandate from voters for her economic policies and tough stance on immigration and China.

item.title: Savannah Guthrie, in New Video, Promises to Pay for Her Mother’s Return
item.description: The “Today” show anchor, in a message on social media with her siblings, said the return of their mother Nancy “is the only way we will have peace.”

item.title: MAGA Elites Are Indoor Cats
item.description: Before MAGA, conservatives’ affinity for wilderness was a powerful force in American politics.

item.title: Starmer’s Chief of Staff Resigns, Citing Role in Mandelson Appointment
item.description: The chief of staff, Morgan McSweeney, was caught up in the scandal engulfing Britain’s former ambassador to the United States and his ties to Jeffrey ...

item.title: Portugal Votes for President, With Leftist Set to Beat Surging Far Right
item.description: Polls predict a comfortable victory for António José Seguro, but a nationalist’s presence in the runoff showed that Portugal is not immune to Europe’s...
